channel.title: Mermaid Live Editor on cmdragon's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mermaid Live Editor on cmdragon's Blog

item.title: graph td 表格數據可視化太難？mermaid-live-editor - 即時預覽 + 語法友好，一鍵生成專業流程圖/進度表
item.description: 傳統表格轉圖表存在手動操作複雜、格式相容性低、即時性不足等限制。mermaid-live-editor 支援 graph td 語法，可即時生成流程圖並預覽，支援拖曳調整樣式和多格式匯出（PNG/SVG），適用於專案管理、技術文件等場景。

item.title: graph td表格数据可视化太难？mermaid-live-editor-实时预览+语法友好，一键生成专业流程图/进度表
item.description: 传统表格转图表存在手动操作复杂、格式兼容性低、实时性不足等局限。mermaid-live-editor支持graph td语法，可实时生成流程图并预览，支持拖拽调整样式和多格式导出（PNG/SVG），适用于项目管理、技术文档等场景。

item.title: Struggling with Graph TD Table Data Visualization? Mermaid Live Editor Offers Real-Time Preview + User-Friendly Syntax for Professional Flowcharts/Progress Charts
item.description: Traditional table-to-chart conversion suffers from complex manual operations, poor format compatibility, and insufficient real-time feedback. Mermaid Live Editor supports Graph TD syntax, enabling real-time flowchart generation and preview, drag-and-drop styling adjustments, and multi-format export (PNG/SVG), ideal for project management and technical documentation.

item.title: mermaid live editor A Lightweight, Efficient Online Flowchart Tool Essential for Professionals and Students
item.description: mermaid live editor is a lightweight, online flowchart tool requiring no installation, featuring grammar-driven design and real-time previews. It supports full-scenario diagrams including flowcharts, sequence diagrams, and more. Users edit code on the left and view live previews on the right, leveraging grammar templates for quick mastery. Export as images or Markdown for workplace project management, knowledge organization, and code documentation integration.

item.title: mermaid live editor 輕量高效的在線流程圖工具，職場人和學生必備神器
item.description: mermaid live editor 是一個輕量級的在线流程圖工具，無需安裝，語法驅動，實時預覽。支援流程圖、時序圖等全場景。使用時左侧編輯代碼，右侧實時預覽，可利用語法模板快速上手，支援導出圖片或 Markdown，適用於職場項目管理、學習知識梳理及代碼文檔銜接。

item.title: mermaid live editor 轻量高效的在线流程图工具，职场人和学生必备神器
item.description: mermaid live editor是轻量在线流程图工具，无需安装，语法驱动，实时预览。支持流程图、时序图等全场景。使用时左侧编辑代码，右侧实时预览，可利用语法模板快速上手，支持导出图片或Markdown，适用于职场项目管理、学习知识梳理及代码文档衔接。
